{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2011}} {{Use dmy dates|date=April 2020}} {{Infobox Film festival |name = 68th Venice International Film Festival |image = VeniceFilmFestival68poster.jpg |caption = Festival poster |opening = ''[[The Ides of March (2011 film)|The Ides of March]]'' |closing = ''[[Damsels in Distress (film)|Damsels in Distress]]'' |location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] |founded = 1932 |awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[Faust (2011 film)|Faust]]'' |artistic_director= Marco Müller |host = [[Vittoria Puccini]] |number = |date = 31 August – 10 September 2011 |website = [http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/ Website] | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[67th Venice International Film Festival|67th]] | followed_by = [[69th Venice International Film Festival|69th]] }} The '''68th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held from 31 August and 10 September 2011, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]].{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/lineup/ |title=68th Venice Film Festival Line-up |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110924061111/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/lineup/ |archive-date=24 September 2011 |access-date=28 April 2018 }} American filmmaker [[Darren Aronofsky]] was the jury president for the main competition.{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-13213802 |date=27 April 2011 |title=Darren Aronofsky to head Venice film festival jury |work=BBC News |access-date=6 May 2011 |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110506070130/http://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-13213802| archive-date= 6 May 2011}} Italian actress [[Vittoria Puccini]] was the Host of the opening and closing ceremonies. The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[Faust (2011 film)|Faust]]'' by [[Alexander Sokurov]]. Italian filmmaker [[Marco Bellocchio]] received the [[Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement]] during the festival.{{cite web|date=11 May 2011|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-13332194|title=Cannes Film Festival to honour jailed Iranian directors|work=BBC News|access-date=11 May 2011| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20110511040227/http://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-13332194| archive-date= 11 May 2011 | url-status= live}} The festival opened with ''[[The Ides of March (2011 film)|The Ides of March]]'' by [[George Clooney]],{{cite web|last=Vivarelli|first=Nick|date=22 June 2011|url=https://variety.com/2011/film/news/venice-confirms-ides-as-opener-1118038944/|title=Venice confirms 'Ides' as opener|work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]]|access-date=22 June 2011}} and closed with ''[[Damsels in Distress (film)|Damsels in Distress]]'' by [[Whit Stillman]].{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/lineup/off-sel/out-of-competition/damsels-distress.html |title=68th Venice Film Festival – Damsels in Distress [Closing Film] – Whit Stillman |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110924171046/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/lineup/off-sel/out-of-competition/damsels-distress.html |archive-date=24 September 2011 |access-date=29 April 2018 }} ==Juries== === Main competition (''Venezia 68'') === * [[Darren Aronofsky]], American filmmaker - Jury President{{cite web|url=http://www.carnivalofvenice.com/the-city/events-in-venice/venice-film-festival/the-juries/juries-for-the-2010s?lang=en |title=Juries for the 2010s |work=carnivalofvenice.com |date=9 September 2012 |access-date=28 April 2018}} * [[Eija-Liisa Ahtila]], Finnish visual artist and filmmaker * [[David Byrne]], British-American musician * [[Todd Haynes]], American filmmaker * [[Mario Martone]], Italian filmmaker * [[Alba Rohrwacher]], Italian actress * [[André Téchiné]], French filmmaker === ''[[Orizzonti]]'' === * [[Jia Zhangke]], Chinese filmmaker - Jury President * [[Stuart Comer]], British Curator of Film at [[Tate Modern]] * [[Odile Decq]], French architect * [[Marianne Khoury]], Egyptian director * [[Jacopo Quadri]], Italian film editor === Controcampo Italiano === * [[Stefano Incerti]], Italian author - Jury President * Aureliano Amadei, Italian actor * [[Cristiana Capotondi]], Italian actress === Opera Prima (Venice Award for a Debut Film) === * [[Carlo Mazzacurati]], Italian director - Jury President * [[Aleksei Fedorchenko]], Russian director * [[Fred Roos]], American producer * Charles Tesson, French Artistic Director of the [[International Critics' Week]] at the [[Cannes Film Festival]] * [[Serra Yilmaz]], Turkish actress ==Official Sections== ===In Competition=== The following films were selected for the main competition:{{cite web |url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/lineup/off-sel/venezia68/ |title=68th Venice Film Festival Venezia 68 |work=labiennale.org |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110927003322/http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/lineup/off-sel/venezia68/ |archive-date=27 September 2011 |access-date=28 April 2018 }} {| class="wikitable" style="width:95%; margin-bottom:0px" |- !
